This is a follow-up to your previous request #379648 "MK STUDIO has a question a..."

Hello
I have multiple issues with failed labels, i can't pay 30usd to save on shipping when my employees need to constantly make shipments manually. Can you please contact me asap


Best regards

Michał Kałużny-Włodarek

On 21.03.2026 17:01:22, PluginHive <support@pluginhive.com> wrote:

Hello Enquiries,

We'd love to hear what you think of our customer service. Please take a moment to answer one simple question by clicking either link below:

How would you rate the support you received?


Good, I'm satisfied

Bad, I'm unsatisfied

Here's a reminder of what this request was about:

Sagar K S (PluginHive)

Mar 19, 2026, 02:47 GMT+5:30

Hello Enquiries,
 
Greetings from PluginHive!
 
It is possible to fulfil an order in the app that automatically fulfil the order in shopify and update the tracking number to the shopify order.
 
To do so, Select the Label Created Order -> Click on Mark as Fulfilled.
 

 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

Enquiries

Mar 18, 2026, 23:10 GMT+5:30

 

March 18, 2026

 

 

New message about PH MultiCarrier Shipping Label

 

MK STUDIO sent you a message. See it below.

 
 
 
 

After generating a UPS label, how do I automatically mark the Shopify order as fulfilled without a manual mark as shipped step?

 

15‍1 O'Con‍nor Str‍eet, Gro‍und fl‍oor, Ot‍tawa ON, K2P 2L8
